items.text: Run baseline PanesContext tests and inspect allocator/tests for current behavior
Implement allocator tiers in PanesContext and rerun PanesContext tests
Remove visibility gate, update tests, and rerun PanesContext suite
Run downstream consumer tests and summarize execution evidence

{
  "name": "vite_react_shadcn_ts",
  "private": true,
  "version": "0.0.0",
  "type": "module",
  "engines": {
    "node": ">=20.9.0"
  },
  "scripts": {
    "dev": "vite --config config/vite/vite.config.ts",
    "build": "tsc && vite build --config config/vite/vite.config.ts",
    "build:dev": "vite build --mode development --config config/vite/vite.config.ts",
    "lint": "eslint . --ext ts,tsx --report-unused-disable-directives --max-warnings 0",
    "lint:edge": "eslint supabase/functions --ext ts --max-warnings 0",
    "preview": "vite preview --config config/vite/vite.config.ts",
    "preview:full": "npm run preview --port 5001",
    "start:railway": "npm run build && npm run serve",
    "serve": "vite preview --config config/vite/vite.config.ts --host 0.0.0.0 --port $PORT",
    "db:seed": "tsx ./db/seed.ts",
    "bun:dev": "bun run dev",
    "bun:build": "bun run build",
    "bun:preview": "bun run preview",
    "bun:install": "bun install",
    "test": "npm run check:no-smoke-tests && vitest run --config config/testing/vitest.config.ts",
    "test:contracts": "vitest run --config config/testing/vitest.config.ts src/**/**/*.contract.test.ts src/**/**/clientContracts.test.ts src/shared/lib/__tests__/qualityCheck.contract.test.ts",
    "test:arch": "npm run check:shots-shim-usage && npm run check:core-shim-usage && npm run check:error-runtime-alias-usage && npm run check:contracts && npm run check:contract-surface-map",
    "test:edge": "npm run test:edge:unit && npm run test:edge:smoke",
    "test:edge:unit": "vitest run --config config/testing/vitest.edge.config.ts",
    "test:edge:smoke": "vitest run --config config/testing/vitest.edge.smoke.config.ts --testNamePattern=\"Smoke\"",
    "test:watch": "npm run check:no-smoke-tests && vitest --config config/testing/vitest.config.ts",
    "test:coverage": "vitest run --coverage --config config/testing/vitest.config.ts",
    "check:edge-budget": "node scripts/edge/quality-budget.mjs --check",
    "check:no-smoke-tests": "node scripts/quality/check-no-smoke-tests.mjs",
    "check:core-shim-usage": "node scripts/quality/check-core-shim-usage.mjs",
    "check:error-runtime-alias-usage": "node scripts/quality/check-error-runtime-alias-usage.mjs",
    "check:shots-shim-usage": "node scripts/quality/check-shots-shim-usage.mjs --max 0",
    "check:contracts": "node scripts/quality/check-contract-governance.mjs",
    "check:contract-surface-map": "node scripts/quality/check-contract-surface-map.mjs",
    "lint:strict-islands": "eslint src/app src/integrations/supabase/bootstrap src/shared/lib/debugPolling.ts src/shared/lib/mobileProjectDebug.ts src/shared/components/MediaGallery/hooks/useMediaGalleryDebugTools.ts src/shared/components/MediaLightbox/hooks/useVideoLightboxEnvironment.ts src/shared/components/MediaLightbox/hooks/useVideoLightboxRenderModel.tsx src/tools/travel-between-images/components/ShotImagesEditor/hooks/useShotImagesEditorCallbacks.ts src/tools/travel-between-images/components/ShotImagesEditor/hooks/useShotImagesEditorModel.ts src/shared/lib/tasks/travelBetweenImages supabase/functions/create-task --ext ts,tsx --max-warnings 0",
    "typecheck:strict-islands": "tsc -p tsconfig.strict-islands.json --noEmit",
    "typecheck:strict-probe": "npm run typecheck:strict-islands",
    "quality:check": "npm run check:no-smoke-tests && npm run check:shots-shim-usage && npm run check:core-shim-usage && npm run check:error-runtime-alias-usage && npm run check:contracts && npm run check:contract-surface-map && npm run lint && npm run typecheck:strict-probe"
